boot.introduction: Hello, I'm HyunHo Kim, a Node.js-based junior full-stack web developer.
boot.experience: I've built the frontend of an AI agent platform from scratch and implemented the Voice Gateway responsible for real-time voice processing in an AICC solution.
boot.aiApproach: Beyond simply using AI, I validate it firsthand and combine multiple agents to produce better results.
boot.helpHint: To see available commands, type "help" and press Enter.
boot.portfolioSuffix: to explore my portfolio. Or type "startx".
